briefdescription.para: signal about lines changing, triggered in setDirtyFlag
width on lines on screen in pixels
scale object size (all point positions)
does the object have any visual representation (visible points, triangles, edges, etc.), no considering child objects

detaileddescription.para: does the object have any model available (but possibly empty), e.g. ObjectMesh has valid mesh() or ObjectPoints has valid pointCloud()
clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

briefdescription.para: reinterpret_cast to avoid making a copy of shared_ptr

detaileddescription.para: specify dash pattern in pixels [0] - dash [1] - space [2] - dash [3] - space

simplesect.para: this ctor is public only for std::make_shared used inside clone()

briefdescription.para: returns per-vertex colors of the object
sets per-vertex colors of the object
swaps per-vertex colors of the object with given argument
Returns true if this class supports the property type. Otherwise passing it to the functions below is illegal.
get all visualize properties masks
returns mask of viewports where given property is set
copies vertex colors from given source object

detaileddescription.para: returns cached bounding box of this point object in world coordinates; if you need bounding box in local coordinates please call getBoundingBox()

briefdescription.para: returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap
returns cached average edge length
returns cached information about the number of undirected edges in the polyline
returns cached information about the number of components in the polyline
return cached total length
reset basic object colors to their default values from the current theme
swaps this object with other

detaileddescription.para: swaps signals, used in swap function to return back signals after swapBase_ pls call Parent::swapSignals_ first when overriding this function
we serialize polyline as text so separate polyline serialization and base fields serialization serializeBaseFields_ serializes Parent fields and base fields of ObjectLinesHolder

briefdescription.para: serializeFields_: serializeBaseFields_ plus polyline serialization
Reads model from file.

detaileddescription.para: we serialize polyline as text so separate polyline serialization and base fields serialization deserializeBaseFields_ deserialize Parent fields and base fields of ObjectLinesHolder

briefdescription.para: deserializeFields_: deserializeBaseFields_ plus polyline deserialization

detaileddescription.para: each renderable child of VisualObject should implement this method and assign renderObj_ inside

briefdescription.para: set all visualize properties masks
this is private function to set default colors of this type (ObjectLinesHolder) in constructor only
set default scene-related properties

detaileddescription.para: an object that stores a lines
